ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the repository is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the repository was last updated */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level required to interact with the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the issue belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of labels */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was closed */,
  "resolved_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_resolved_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the issue type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the issue type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the issue type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the prediction belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predicted issue type */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the prediction */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the prediction has been confirmed */,
  "confirmed_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who confirmed the prediction */,
  "confirmed_at" TEXT /* Date the prediction was confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES issue_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_confirmed_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("confirmed_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction the feedback belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comments provided by the user */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the feedback */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_resolved_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the model is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "last_trained_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was read */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Notification channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the integration belongs to */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the platform integrated */,
  "access_token" TEXT /* Access token for the integration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the integration is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the integration was last updated */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Date the integration was last synchronized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., created issue, updated prediction) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user performing the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the threshold belongs to */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for prediction confidence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the threshold is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the threshold was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the threshold was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the label belongs to */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the label is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the label was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the label was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)
